amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 58 — paragraph 6 (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 58 — paragraph 6 (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

The advisory forum shall draw up its rules of procedure. It shall elect two co-Chairs from among its members, in accordance with criteria set out in paragraph 2. The term of office of the co-Chairs shall be two years, renewable once.
parliament_text: The advisory forum shall draw up its rules of procedure. It shall elect two co-Chairs from among its members, in accordance with criteria set out in paragraph 2. The term of office of the co-Chairs shall be two years, renewable once.
